overall.description: Static first-person view from a cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom at blue hour, overlooking a futuristic cityscape with neon-lit skyscrapers and occasional flying vehicles. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a messy bed in the foreground and a panoramic window revealing the dense urban metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: futuristic flying vehicle passes by the window from left to right
second flying vehicle appears in the distance and travels across the skyline

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in the apartment, gazing out at the illuminated cityscape through the large panoramic window

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car traveling horizontally across the window view outside

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window dominating the wall, providing expansive view of the city
unmade bed with rumpled silver sheets occupying the foreground
dark textured brick wall with modern shelving and lighting fixtures
dense cluster of cyberpunk skyscrapers with glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements
rectangular overhead light panel illuminating the room interior
small dark table near the window with a device or object resting on top

segments.scene_description: A static view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom overlooking a futuristic metropolis at blue hour. The unmade bed sits in the foreground while the panoramic window reveals a hazy skyline of neon-lit towers. Occasional flying vehicles pass by the window, and the interior features exposed brick walls with modern lighting fixtures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a cyberpunk bedroom that looks out over a sprawling, neon-lit metropolis during the blue hour. It begins with a focus on the intimate, cluttered interior, where an unmade bed sits in the foreground against a backdrop of exposed brick walls and modern lighting. As the eye drifts toward the panoramic window, the view expands to reveal a hazy skyline dominated by towering skyscrapers. The scene then settles into the rhythmic movement of the city, with occasional flying vehicles gliding past the glass. Finally, the gaze lingers on the dense urban expanse, contrasting the stillness of the apartment with the vibrant, electric energy of the futuristic city.
